title: Rink Drink Drinking Mason Jars with Lids and Reusable Straw - Pack of 4-620ml Glass Drinking Jar Mugs with Handles and Screw Top for Overnight Oats, Smoothies, Cocktails, Drinks
features: ⭐ Fun & Retro Mason Jar Style – Add charm to any gathering with these Knoxville Jam Jar Drinking Glasses. Inspired by vintage Mason jars, their shabby chic design makes even simple drinks feel fun and special.

🛡️ Spill-Reducing Lids & Colourful Straws – Each glass comes with a tight-fitting metal lid and a bold red-and-white striped straw, helping prevent spills while keeping drinks fresher for longer—perfect for parties and outdoor events.

👌 Comfortable Easy-Grip Handles – Designed with sturdy mug-style handles, these jars provide a secure, comfortable grip that keeps your hands away from the drink, maintaining a cooler temperature with every sip.
💦 Durable & Dishwasher Safe – Made from quality glass with reusable straws included, these jars are built for repeated use and effortless cleaning, making post-party cleanup quick and convenient.

📏 Large Capacity & Perfect Size – Each glass holds 620ml (21.8oz) and measures 14.5cm tall x 8.8cm wide, all packaged in a set of 4, ideal for water, juice, soft drinks, iced tea, cocktails, and more.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! Cocktail Glasses By Rink Drink In an age where the service and presentation of food and drink has become an art form in itself, the Rink Drink range of Cocktail Glasses offers everything you need to ensure your home kitchen, bar or restaurant is fully prepared to cater for every whim; from casual drinkers to cocktail connoisseurs. Toughened Glass Construction - Durable; designed to last for years Dishwasher Safe - Hassle-free cleaning after the party's over Elongated Stem - Helps keep your favourite cocktails cooler and fresher for longer!
